name: Grilled Flank Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients to create a marinade.
2. Place the flank steak in a resealable plastic bag or container and pour the marinade over the steak, ensuring it is fully coated. Refrigerate overnight to allow flavors to develop.
3. Preheat your grill to high heat.
4. Remove the steak from the marinade and place it on the hot part of the grill. Grill for 5 to 10 minutes per side, depending on how rare you prefer it.
5. Using a sharp knife, slice the steak thinly across the grain. Serve immediately.
